note: Sprint 5.16: adds Useful Compute signed payment draft v0.1. Converts a Sprint 5.15 payment proposal into a reviewable transaction draft. No automatic broadcast, no auto-pay, human review required. Two modes: --unsigned-only (default; wallet NEVER touched) and --dry-sign (verifies --wallet path exists, requires --from-label or --from-address; v0.1 does NOT actually sign, only writes a placeholder signed_tx_hex). Both modes require a mode-specific verbatim confirmation token: unsigned-only -> I_UNDERSTAND_THIS_IS_ONLY_A_DRAFT_AND_WILL_NOT_BROADCAST; dry-sign -> I_UNDERSTAND_THIS_USES_WALLET_KEYS_BUT_DOES_NOT_BROADCAST. New scripts/trinity/useful_compute_payment_draft.py loads the proposal, filters dust (default 546 stocks), respects optional --max-total-stocks cap, copies capsule_summary verbatim. CLI pre-checks raw_argv and rejects --broadcast, --send, --payout-now, --auto-pay, --sendrawtransaction, --export-private-key with rc=2 BEFORE argparse runs (so static safety checks see no forbidden bare identifiers). New schemas/trinity/useful_compute_payment_draft.schema.json with four const-locked safety flags (no_broadcast=true, human_review_required=true, private_keys_exported=false, requires_separate_broadcast=true) and two typed boolean flags (dry_sign_only, wallet_access_used) so they can vary with mode. draft_id deterministic from canonical(mode, source_proposal_id, pinned_time, outputs, warnings, max_total_stocks); two runs on the same inputs are byte-identical. Web console gains a Signed Payment Draft card (read-only loader, no wallet/seed/RPC/private-key inputs, no fetch/XHR/WebSocket/EventSource/sendBeacon); badge bumped to v1.0. Tests: 57 new across tests/trinity/test_{useful_compute_payment_draft,useful_compute_payment_draft_schema,payment_draft_web_console,payment_draft_safety}.py; static safety + no-network checks extended to cover useful_compute_payment_draft.py. Trinity suite 663/663 PASS with materials-engine-private present. docs/TRINITY_USEFUL_COMPUTE_SIGNED_PAYMENT_DRAFT_V01.md. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wire-format change. No real signing performed (v0.1 dry-sign is a placeholder).
